ddl.value: "target_type" <> 'all' OR (array_length("target_dept_ids", 1) IS NULL AND array_length("target_emp_ids", 1) IS NULL)
ddl.name: bc_all_no_ids_chk

ddl.value: "verified_at" IS NULL OR "verified_by" IS NOT NULL
ddl.name: doc_verified_at_requires_by_chk

ddl.value: "decided_at" IS NULL OR "approver_id" IS NOT NULL
ddl.name: reg_decided_needs_approver_chk

ddl.value: "approved_at" IS NULL OR "approved_by" IS NOT NULL
ddl.name: resignation_approved_needs_approver_chk
